name: finch-pjblog
description: PJBlog For Finch — write markdown posts with AI, generate a static blog, live preview, and publish to Git Pages.

finch.name: PJBlog For Finch
finch.description: Write markdown posts together with AI, generate a static blog (home / post / archive pages), live-preview while writing, and publish to GitHub Pages with one click.
finch.systemPrompt: When the user wants to create a blog, write a blog post / diary in markdown, preview the blog, or publish the blog, use the pjblog_* tools. Blog workspace is a directory containing blog.config.json.

promptGuides.title: Create my blog
promptGuides.prompt: 帮我初始化一个 PJBlog 博客工作区

promptGuides.title: Write a post
promptGuides.prompt: 帮我写一篇新的博客日志，主题是：
